What We Do

Our Services

Professional auto detailing packages tailored to every vehicle and every budget.

Exterior

Exterior Wash

Starting at $25

Our precision exterior wash removes dirt, road grime, and contaminants from every surface, leaving your paint clean and protected.

  • Hand wash & rinse
  • Wheel & tire clean
  • Window exterior clean
  • Hand dry & finish
Book Now
Interior

Interior Cleaning

Starting at $45

A thorough interior clean that leaves your cabin fresh, hygienic, and comfortable — every surface attended to with care.

  • Deep vacuum (seats, floors, trunk)
  • Dashboard & console wipe-down
  • Interior window clean
  • Door panel cleaning
Book Now
Popular

Standard Detailing

Starting at $65

Combines our exterior wash and interior cleaning into one complete service package, perfect for regular maintenance.

  • Full exterior wash & dry
  • Complete interior vacuum & wipe
  • Tire shine application
  • All windows cleaned inside & out
Book Now
Premium

Full Detailing

Starting at $140

Our most comprehensive service. A deep restoration that returns your vehicle to showroom-level perfection, inside and out.

  • Premium exterior wash & clay bar prep
  • Hand wax & paint protection
  • Full interior deep clean
  • Leather/fabric conditioning
  • Tire & trim dressing
  • Engine bay wipe-down
Book Now
Enhance Your Service

Add-On Services

Customize your detail with premium add-on treatments for the ultimate result.

  • Door & Dash Protectant
  • Seat Shampoo
  • Hand Wax / Polish
  • Engine Bay Cleaning
  • Headlight Restoration
  • Clay Bar Treatment
  • Pet Hair Removal
  • Extra Dirty Surcharge
  • Mobile Service

Transparent Rates

Pricing

Clear, honest pricing with no hidden fees. Premium detailing at fair value.

Service Rates

Detailing Packages

Service Sedan SUV / Pickup
Exterior Wash
Hand wash, rinse, dry, windows		 $25 $30
Interior Cleaning
Vacuum, wipe-down, windows		 $45 $50
Standard Detailing
Exterior + Interior combined		 $65 $75
Full Detailing
Complete deep restoration		 $140 $160
Optional Upgrades

Add-On Pricing

Headlight Restoration$40
Clay Bar Treatment$60
Hand Wax$40
Pet Hair Removal$25
Seat Shampoo$60
Engine Restoration$80–$150
Door & Dash Protectant$20
Extra Dirty Surcharge+$20
Large Vehicle Surcharge+$20
Mobile Service+$10

Important Notes

  • All prices are in Barbados Dollars (BBD)
  • Surcharges apply for extra dirty vehicles (+$20)
  • Large vehicles (vans, trucks) incur additional charge (+$20)
  • Mobile service available islandwide (+$10)
  • Engine restoration pricing depends on vehicle condition ($80–$150)
  • Prices may vary — contact us for a custom quote

Our Story

About Us

Born in Barbados. Built on passion. Driven by perfection.

5+
Years of
Excellence
Who We Are

Gihon Auto Spa
& Detail

Gihon Auto Spa & Detail was founded with a simple but powerful belief: every vehicle deserves to be treated with the care, precision, and expertise it was built with. What started as a passion for cars and an obsession with cleanliness has grown into Barbados' most trusted professional detailing service.

We combine premium-grade products, proven techniques, and genuine attention to detail to deliver results that consistently exceed our clients' expectations. From daily drivers to luxury vehicles, every car that passes through our hands gets the same dedication and craftsmanship.

Our Mission

"To deliver an unmatched auto detailing experience that restores, protects, and elevates every vehicle we touch — with quality, precision, and perfection at every step."

Book With Us
What Drives Us

Our Values

01
Quality

We never cut corners. Every product, every tool, every technique is chosen for its ability to deliver the finest possible outcome for your vehicle.

02
Precision

Detail work is in our name — and it's in our DNA. We approach every job with methodical care, ensuring nothing is overlooked and nothing is rushed.

03
Perfection

We hold ourselves to the highest standard on every job. Perfection isn't a goal — it's our baseline. We're not satisfied until you are.

Ready to Start?

Let's Make Your Car
Shine

Book your appointment today and discover the Gihon difference.
